title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. pyrenaica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. pyrenaica, commonly known as Pyrenean kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. pyrenaica include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
